metadata.notes: All confirmed findings in the report are npm-audit SCA findings; no confirmed SAST findings were present.

changed_code.snippet: "overrides": { "mocha": { "diff": "5.2.2", "js-yaml": "4.1.1", "minimatch": "3.1.4", "nanoid": "3.3.8", "serialize-javascript": "7.0.5" }, "@typescript-eslint/typescript-estree": { "minimatch": "9.0.7" }, "replace": { "minimatch": "3.1.4" } }

remediations.fix_rationale: Root package.json overrides force the vulnerable transitive minimatch used by test/lint tooling to a patched compatible version (override @typescript-eslint/typescript-estree to minimatch 9.0.7 and mocha/replace to minimatch 3.1.4) without changing application source or routes.
remediations.functionality_preservation: Uses npm overrides for transitive test/lint dependency versions only; no source code, routes, challenge logic, response shapes, or UI behavior changed.

validation.notes: npm install completed and npm run build:server passed. npm run test:server was attempted; baseline install with --ignore-scripts prevented libxmljs2 native bindings from being built, so tests could not run in this environment. Earlier Mocha major-upgrade attempts failed and were not kept.

remediations.residual_risk: Residual npm audit findings remain for dependencies whose safe fixes require breaking upgrades or product decisions.

changed_code.snippet: No code or dependency change applied; deferred for maintainer decision.

remediations.fix_rationale: No safe narrow SCA-only fix was applied. npm audit reports the available remediation requires a breaking direct dependency upgrade, a package with no fix, or changing/removing intentionally vulnerable challenge-related dependencies.
remediations.functionality_preservation: Deferred rather than applying risky breaking upgrades that could alter challenge behavior or application APIs.

validation.notes: No change applied for this finding; validation applies to fixed override set only.

remediations.residual_risk: Finding remains until maintainers approve a breaking dependency upgrade, package replacement, or challenge behavior change.

remediations.residual_risk: Residual npm audit findings remain for dependencies whose safe fixes require breaking upgrades or product decisions.

changed_code.snippet: No code or dependency change applied; deferred for maintainer decision.

remediations.fix_rationale: No safe narrow SCA-only fix was applied. npm audit reports the available remediation requires a breaking direct dependency upgrade, a package with no fix, or changing/removing intentionally vulnerable challenge-related dependencies.
remediations.functionality_preservation: Deferred rather than applying risky breaking upgrades that could alter challenge behavior or application APIs.
